title: UTILITY ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: GRANT COUNTY UTILITY ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with electric, gas, heating fuel, and water payments. 530 E Main Street Suite 6 John Day, OR 97845 Eligibility: Must meet income limits Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 575-2949 1600 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 575-2949 Main phone Person (541) 575-2949 ext 1600 Amy Smetana [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income AREA SERVED: Grant County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Services: Electric Service Payment Assistance Gas Service Payment Assistance Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Water Service Payment Assistance Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - RENT ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUPPORTIVE SERVICES FOR VETERAN FAMILIES INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GRANT COUNTY
